osm_buildings.note: Full building processing requires geopandas; mock summary for MVP

infrared_analysis.raw_grid_note: Current cache stores Infrared min/mean/max, bounds and grid shape. Raw merged grid cells are required for a true Infrared raster heat map.

visual_limits: The 500 m analysis square remains blank by default and is not a combined risk surface.
Climate, solar, direct sun, wind-stagnation, UTCI, sky-view obstruction, and canopy are separate screening grids.
Infrared City cache currently provides summary statistics and grid metadata. True raster heat maps require raw merged_grid cells.

osm_aligned_buildings.note: Footprints are local OSM geometry. Heights are estimated because this shapefile has no height field.

geometry.geometry_note: The visual checkpoint uses local OSM footprints for map and 3D alignment. Infrared City is used for analysis values; its mesh coordinate frame is kept separately.
